ops.title: cc-skills capt-hook pack changes re-fetch off plugin.json version, not capt-hook.toml
ops.body:
In `~/Code/cc-skills`, a capt-hook pack lives under `plugins/<pack>/hooks/` and has two version fields: `hooks/capt-hook.toml` (`version=`) and `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` (`version=`). To make consumers re-fetch after editing a pack hook, bump **plugin.json** — the marketplace (`yasyf/cc-skills`, `autoUpdate: true`) keys re-fetch on it. `capt-hook.toml`'s version is cosmetic for re-fetch because `capt-hook pack attach` (wired to SessionStart) uses a **content-addressed cache**, so new hook content re-attaches regardless of the toml version. Precedent: the prior `wall_of_text.py` change bumped only plugin.json (0.1.0→0.1.1) and left capt-hook.toml at 0.1.0; the f08 fix did the same (0.1.1→0.1.2).

Testing/verifying a pack hook: `uvx capt-hook --hooks <pack>/hooks test` runs its inline `tests={}` (LLM verdicts are stubbed — `llm={'fire': False}` forces the false path; default stub is fire=true). The real LLM path is only exercised by live dispatch: pipe a fixture `input.json` (with a fresh `session_id`, since HookState is keyed on it and `max_fires` drains) into `uvx capt-hook --hooks <pack>/hooks run <Event>` from a git cwd (spawnllm ≥0.5.5 errors in non-git cwds). This repo is jj-colocated with parallel sessions — isolate in a jj workspace before editing. See [[parallel-sessions-own-the-working-copy]].
